results.justification: MoA stacks specialized agents in layers — adjacent but doesn't impose 3-role asymmetric DAG with distinct resource types per role.
Constructs adaptive task graphs (DAGs) over agents — directly matches TSARM's DAG cooperation structure.
Survey explicitly catalogs 3-agent role-specialized teams (two domain experts + summarizer) as effective MAS — directly the 3-role asymmetric structure of TSARM.
Empirical study of team underperformance — different inquiry.
Has central evolving orchestrator — TSARM disclaims orchestrator; different topology.
Latent shared-memory multi-agent — operationally same mutual-support primitive, even if symmetric rather than asymmetric.
2-agent symbiotic — adjacent but different cardinality + different mechanism.
